name: Chocolate Chip Bars
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup packed golden brown sugar (C and H)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Beat in the egg, then stir in the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt).
3. Add the vanilla and mix until just combined.
4. Gently fold in the chocolate pieces and chopped walnuts.
5. Spread the batter evenly into a greased 15 x 10-inch pan.
6. Bake at 375°F for 12 to 15 minutes.
7. Allow the bars to cool slightly before cutting into 48 squares.
